---
title: "Evan M. Eastman"
pagetitle: "Evan M. Eastman"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu"
    - icon: person-badge
      text: FSU Profile
      href: "https://business.fsu.edu/person/evan-eastman"
    - icon: building
      text: FSU RMI Center
      href: "https://insurancecenter.business.fsu.edu/"
    - text: "{{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar >}} Scholar"
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ksnlHLAAAAAJ&hl=en"
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons ssrn >}} SSRN"
      href: "https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=2361505"
---

I am the Independent Life and Accident Insurance Associate Professor and  Research Coordinator for the [Risk Management and Insurance Center](https://insurancecenter.business.fsu.edu/) at Florida State University in the Herbert Wertheim College of Business.  I serve as a faculty member in the Department of Risk Management/Insurance, Real Estate, and Legal Studies in the Dr. William T. Hold/The Alliance's Program in Risk Management and Insurance.

My research focuses on empirical archival insurance economics. Active areas include financial accounting, taxation, corporate risk management, and real estate.

```{=html}
<!-- Symposium announcement. Rendered in the body, then relocated by the script below
     into the About left column, under the link buttons. Update the body text once
     the 2027 call-for-papers details are finalized. -->
<div id="symposium-box" class="symposium-box">
  <div class="symposium-box__label">FSU RMI Research Symposium</div>
  <p class="symposium-box__body">Information on the 2027 meeting is coming soon.</p>
  <a class="symposium-box__link" href="https://wertheim.fsu.edu/rmiresearchsymposium">Learn more &rarr;</a>
  <div class="symposium-box__host">Hosted by the <a href="https://insurancecenter.business.fsu.edu/">Risk Management and Insurance Center</a> and the Dr. William T. Hold/The Alliance's Program in Risk Management and Insurance.</div>
</div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var box = document.getElementById('symposium-box');
    var entity = document.querySelector('.about-entity');
    if (box && entity) { entity.appendChild(box); }
  })();
</script>
```

## Education

- **Ph.D.** Risk Management and Insurance, University of Georgia, 2017
- **B.S.** Economics, The Pennsylvania State University, 2012

## Contact

Dr. William T. Hold/The Alliance's Program in Risk Management & Insurance<br>
402 W. Gaines Street <br>
Wertheim Center for Business Excellence 4814<br>
Herbert Wertheim College for Business<br>
Florida State University<br>
Tallahassee, FL, 32301<br>
[eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu](mailto:eeastman@wertheim.fsu.edu)
